gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.driverId) FROM results AS T1 INNER JOIN drivers AS T2 on T1.driverId = T2.driverId WHERE T2.nationality = 'Italian' AND T1.time IS NULL
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(T1.driverId) 
FROM drivers AS T1 
JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.driverId = T2.driverId 
WHERE T1.nationality = 'Italian' AND T2.time IS NULL;
question: How many Italian drivers haven't finished the race?
